author: Firstname Lastname
project_description: This is a repository for handling the data for '{{cookiecutter.project_name}}'.

__prompts__.author: Your full name
__prompts__.author_github_handle: Your GitHub username (used for links in generated docs)
__prompts__.project_slug: Python package name — auto-computed from project_name (no dashes)

publish_to_pypi.y: y — add publish step triggered on git tag

deptry.__prompt__: Add deptry for unused/missing dependency checking?

codecov.y: y — add codecov.yaml and upload step

devcontainer.__prompt__: Add VS Code Dev Container configuration?

type_checker.mypy: mypy — the classic, more configurable option

open_source_license.__prompt__: Open source license (choose 'Not open source' for proprietary/internal projects)
open_source_license.GNU General Public License v3: GPL v3 — copyleft, requires derivative works to be open

databricks_asset_bundle.__prompt__: Add Databricks Asset Bundle (DAB) support? Adds databricks.yml, notebooks/, resources/, and Azure DevOps DAB pipelines
databricks_asset_bundle.n: n — plain Python project, no Databricks files

__prompts__.databricks_catalog_prefix: Unity Catalog prefix — builds catalog names: {prefix}_dev, {prefix}_test, {prefix}_prod. Must be lowercase letters, digits and underscores (e.g. 'mdp', 'nrx', 'my_org')
__prompts__.databricks_schema_prefix: Schema prefix for this project — builds schema names: {prefix}_bronze, {prefix}_silver, {prefix}_gold. Encodes the domain/system/department, e.g. 'crm_dyn365', 'npb_volunteering', 'ipb_pims'

databricks_workspace_role.__prompt__: Workspace role this bundle targets. Appended to DAB target names (e.g. release_ip_dev). Use 'ip' for ingestion-process workspaces, 'da' for data-applications workspaces

__prompts__.databricks_default_spark_version: Databricks Runtime (DBR) version for all job clusters (e.g. '13.3.x-scala2.12', '15.4.x-scala2.12'). Can be changed later in databricks.yml

data_contracts.__prompt__: Add data contract YAML files? (only relevant when databricks_asset_bundle=y) Adds data-contracts/ with field definitions and quality rules
data_contracts.y: y — add data-contracts/ folder with examples
